profile.title: Technical foundations, growth mindset, and real execution experience.
profile.intro: My path combines technical education, teamwork, and digital product development in real professional environments.
profile.body: I have practical experience in Web, Mobile, and Backoffice development, as well as technical support and maintenance. I am looking for a role where I can keep growing while finishing my degree, contributing discipline, adaptability, and a strong focus on sound engineering practices.

highlights.title: Full-stack mindset
highlights.description: I work across frontend, backend, databases, and service integration without losing sight of the product as a whole.

highlights.title: Real business context
highlights.description: I have already worked in fast-paced environments with operational responsibility, which sharpened rigor, autonomy, and responsiveness.

highlights.title: Built for progression
highlights.description: I am in a high-growth stage, focused on strengthening fundamentals and turning learning into consistent delivery.

experience.title: Professional experience
experience.note: A mix of software development, technical support, and operational work that strengthened responsibility, communication, and execution under real pace.

items.name: Encontra Saúde
items.description: A backoffice platform for hospital unit management designed to centralize critical information and improve operational efficiency.

Included communication modules between patients and institutions.
Focused on operational efficiency and centralized information.
